sentences.en: Rise and shine, sleepyhead!
sentences.zh: 起床啦，小懶蟲！
sentences.ipa: /raɪz ənd ʃaɪn ˈsliːpihed/

sentences.en: Come to the table, dinner's ready.
sentences.zh: 過來餐桌，晚餐好了。
sentences.ipa: /kʌm tuː ðə ˈteɪbl ˈdɪnərz ˈredi/

sentences.en: It's bath time, hop in the tub.
sentences.zh: 洗澡時間到了，進去浴缸吧。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts bæθ taɪm hɑːp ɪn ðə tʌb/

sentences.en: Let's pack a bag for our trip.
sentences.zh: 我們來打包一個出遊要用的包包吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets pæk ə bæɡ fɔːr ˈaʊər trɪp/

sentences.en: Let's go down the slide together.
sentences.zh: 我們一起去溜滑梯吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ɡoʊ daʊn ðə slaɪd təˈɡeðər/

sentences.en: Grab your backpack, the bus is coming.
sentences.zh: 拿好你的書包，公車要來了。
sentences.ipa: /ɡræb jʊər ˈbækpæk ðə bʌs ɪz ˈkʌmɪŋ/

sentences.en: Let's finish your homework before playtime.
sentences.zh: 我們先把功課寫完再玩。
sentences.ipa: /lets ˈfɪnɪʃ jʊər ˈhoʊmwɜːrk bɪˈfɔːr ˈpleɪtaɪm/

sentences.en: Can you share your blocks with your sister?
sentences.zh: 可以把積木分享給妹妹嗎？
sentences.ipa: /kæn juː ʃer jʊər blɑːks wɪð jʊər ˈsɪstər/

sentences.en: It's okay to feel upset sometimes.
sentences.zh: 有時候感到難過是沒關係的。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts oʊˈkeɪ tuː fiːl ʌpˈset ˈsʌmtaɪmz/

sentences.en: We don't hit, we use gentle hands.
sentences.zh: 我們不打人，要溫柔對待。
sentences.ipa: /wiː doʊnt hɪt wiː juːz ˈdʒentl hændz/

sentences.en: I'm so proud of you!
sentences.zh: 我真為你感到驕傲！
sentences.ipa: /aɪm soʊ praʊd ʌv juː/

sentences.en: Hold my hand when we cross the street.
sentences.zh: 過馬路要牽我的手。
sentences.ipa: /hoʊld maɪ hænd wen wiː krɔːs ðə striːt/

sentences.en: Let's check if you have a fever.
sentences.zh: 我們來看看你有沒有發燒。
sentences.ipa: /lets tʃek ɪf juː hæv ə ˈfiːvər/

sentences.en: Let's go visit Grandma and Grandpa today.
sentences.zh: 我們今天去拜訪爺爺奶奶吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ɡoʊ ˈvɪzɪt ˈɡrænmɑː ənd ˈɡrænpɑː təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: Can I invite my friend over to play?
sentences.zh: 我可以邀朋友來家裡玩嗎？
sentences.ipa: /kæn aɪ ɪnˈvaɪt maɪ frend ˈoʊvər tuː pleɪ/

sentences.en: Remember to say please and thank you.
sentences.zh: 記得要說請和謝謝。
sentences.ipa: /rɪˈmembər tuː seɪ pliːz ənd θæŋk juː/

sentences.en: It's cold outside, put on your jacket.
sentences.zh: 外面很冷，穿上你的外套。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts koʊld ˌaʊtˈsaɪd pʊt ɑːn jʊər ˈdʒækɪt/

sentences.en: You can watch one show after homework.
sentences.zh: 功課寫完可以看一集節目。
sentences.ipa: /juː kæn wɑːtʃ wʌn ʃoʊ ˈæftər ˈhoʊmwɜːrk/

sentences.en: Happy birthday! Let's blow out the candles.
sentences.zh: 生日快樂！我們來吹蠟燭吧。
sentences.ipa: /ˈhæpi ˈbɜːrθdeɪ lets bloʊ aʊt ðə ˈkændlz/

sentences.en: Which book do you want to read tonight?
sentences.zh: 你今晚想讀哪本書？
sentences.ipa: /wɪtʃ bʊk duː juː wɑːnt tuː riːd təˈnaɪt/
